headline: Sheffield's specialist kitchen and bathroom installers — full project management, fixed prices, 10-year guarantee.
subheadline: Sheffield's most trusted kitchen and bathroom installation specialists.
about_text: ProFit Installations designs and fits beautiful kitchens and bathrooms across Sheffield and South Yorkshire. From full strip-outs and tiling to plumbing and electrical first-fix, our certified team manages every stage — fixed price, on time, guaranteed.

services.title: Full Kitchen Installation
services.description: Complete kitchen fitting from unit assembly and worktop templating to tiling, plumbing and electrical connections across Sheffield.

services.title: Bathroom Design & Fit
services.description: Full bathroom transformations — wetrooms, shower enclosures, vanity units and heated towel rails installed to the highest standard.

services.title: Tiling & Wet Room Specialists
services.description: Floor-to-ceiling tiling, large-format tiles, mosaic borders and full wetroom waterproofing systems for Sheffield homes.

reviews.name: Mike D.
reviews.quote: Our new kitchen is stunning — ProFit managed every trade and delivered on time and on budget.
reviews.body: From the first design meeting to the final clean-up, ProFit Installations were outstanding. They coordinated the plumber, electrician and tiler themselves, kept us informed at every stage and the finished kitchen is exactly what we dreamed of.

reviews.name: Karen B.
reviews.quote: The bathroom transformation was incredible — wetroom installed perfectly, no leaks, immaculate finish.
reviews.body: I was nervous about a full bathroom strip-out and wetroom installation but ProFit were professional from start to finish. The waterproofing was done properly, the tiling is flawless and the whole project finished two days ahead of schedule.

reviews.name: Tony L.
reviews.quote: Fixed price quoted before they started — no surprise invoices, brilliant craftsmanship throughout.
reviews.body: Used ProFit for a full kitchen installation across two of my rental properties. They quote fixed prices, stick to them, and the quality of work means my tenants are always delighted. Will use them exclusively going forward.

faqs.question: Do your installers carry all the necessary qualifications?
faqs.answer: Yes — all our fitters are trade-qualified. Our plumbers are Gas Safe registered and electricians are Part P certified.

faqs.question: Do you manage the whole kitchen or bathroom project?
faqs.answer: Yes — ProFit acts as your single point of contact, coordinating all trades from strip-out to final snagging across Sheffield.

faqs.question: Is the installation work guaranteed?
faqs.answer: All installation work carries a 10-year workmanship guarantee and we hold manufacturer warranties on all supplied products.

differentiators: All fitters are trade-qualified — Gas Safe registered plumbers and Part P certified electricians on every project.
We act as a single point of contact and manage all trades from strip-out to final snagging across Sheffield.
Every project includes a full design consultation, mood board and detailed plan before any work begins.
You receive a fixed-price written quote before work starts — the price we quote is the price you pay.
All installation work carries a 10-year workmanship guarantee and full manufacturer product warranties.
Detailed project completion report and warranty documentation provided on handover — ideal for property investors.
jobs_text: Kitchens and bathrooms installed across Sheffield
service_area_text: Sheffield, Rotherham, Barnsley, Doncaster, Chesterfield and surrounding South Yorkshire areas.

metadata.title: ProFit Installations | Kitchen & Bathroom Installers Sheffield
metadata.description: ProFit Installations provides expert kitchen and bathroom fitting across Sheffield and South Yorkshire. Full project management, fixed prices, 10-year guarantee.
